title: astragalus kermanschahensis
intro: Astragalus kermanschahensis, also known as Persian milkvetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family (Fabaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus kermanschahensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue and stress, and exhibit anti-aging properties. Astragalus kermanschahensis is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
